Bash(curl -s -L "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1aeD8c2mY9rwltmVnTl86rx_rYXpSsAq3HTamk-hEs3c/edit" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, re
data = sys.stdin.read\(\)

# The bootstrap data has gridId - let's look for all numeric IDs that appear with sheet names
# Search around each sheet name for nearby numeric IDs
tab_names = ['KPI', 'Attendance', 'Subscribes', 'Purchases', 'Appointments', 'Sales', 'Active Members', 'Membership Cancels', 'PT Cancellations', 'SGPT Cancellations', 'Sheet30', 'Sheet34', 'Leads Tracking', 'Paid Ads']

# Look for switchToSheet or similar function calls with IDs
switches = re.findall\(r'switchToSheet\\\(\(\\d+\)\\\)', data\)
print\('switchToSheet calls:', switches[:20]\)

# Look for any data-sheet-id attributes
data_ids = re.findall\(r'data-sheet-id=\\"\(\\d+\)\\"', data\)
print\('data-sheet-id:', data_ids[:20]\)

# Looks for any link with gid
links = re.findall\(r'gid=\(\\d+\)', data\)
seen = []
for l in links:
    if l not in seen:
        seen.append\(l\)
print\('All GIDs in links:', seen[:30]\)
" 2>&1 | head -50)
